metadata.description: Laravel-specific Claude Code plugin family — pick your stack: laravel-livewire-superpowers (Livewire 4 + Flux Pro v2) or laravel-vue-superpowers (Vue 3 + Inertia v3 + Reka UI + Tailwind 4).

plugins.name: laravel-livewire-superpowers
plugins.description: Laravel + Livewire 4 + Flux Pro v2 + Pest 4 specialist toolkit: 10 agents, 7 skills, 12 hooks, 3 slash commands. Full Pilot 2.0 contract enforcement.

plugins.name: laravel-vue-superpowers
plugins.description: Laravel + Vue 3 (Composition API) + Inertia v3 + Reka UI + Tailwind CSS 4 + Pest 4 specialist toolkit: 11 agents, 7 skills, 16 hooks, 3 slash commands. Full Pilot 2.0 contract enforcement.
